identity.name: E1
principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix spiritual symbolism with high-end luxury aesthetics.
Emotion First: Every interaction should feel like a deep breath.
Content is King: The text is the guide; the design is the temple.
Contrast: Deep shadows vs. divine light (Gold/Purple).

project_context.name: Divine Iris Healing
project_context.target_audience: Spiritual seekers, wellness enthusiasts, luxury wellness clients.
project_context.emotional_tone: Soulful, Comforting, Subliminal, Elevating, Mystical yet Grounded.

headings.usage: All H1-H3 headings. Use uppercase with wide letter-spacing (tracking-widest) for a cinematic feel.

body.usage: Paragraphs, UI elements, buttons. Keep it light (300) for elegance.

golden_sprinkles.description: Small, glowing gold particles that float upwards or shimmer.
golden_sprinkles.implementation: CSS animation keyframes (opacity/transform) on absolute positioned divs.

glossy_waves.description: A smooth, undulating wave effect at the bottom of headers or sections.
glossy_waves.implementation: SVG separator with animateTransform or CSS background-position animation on a gradient.

glassmorphism.style: backdrop-filter: blur(12px); background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.03); border: 1px solid rgba(212, 175, 55, 0.1);

hero.content: Large Cinzel H1, gold text, subtitle in Lato light.

session_list.card_style: Glassmorphic cards. Hover state: slight lift, gold border glow.

booking_section.background: The 'Glue' section. Full-width container with 'gold_wave' animated gradient background.

homepage_sessions_section.flow: Must transition smoothly from the previous section (no hard lines). Use a gradient fade mask or curved SVG divider.
homepage_sessions_section.layout: Horizontal scroll or asymmetric grid to showcase top sessions.

GoldenWaveBackground.instructions: Create a component that renders a div with the animated gold gradient. Use CSS keyframes to move background-position.

SessionCard.instructions: A card component for individual sessions. Props: title, duration, price, image, description. Use Shadcn Card but heavily customized with glassmorphism.

StarField.instructions: A subtle particle effect component. Generates 20-50 small divs with random positions and animation delays to simulate floating dust/stars.

universal_guidelines: Do not use generic gradients. Always layer them.
Use 'Cinzel' for all headings. If it looks too thin, use font-weight 600.
Buttons should be 'Pill' shaped or 'Ghost' style with a gold underline.
Avoid standard shadows; use 'glows' (colored drop-shadows) instead.
Ensure high contrast for accessibility, even in dark mode.
All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attributes.
instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Update index.css to import Cinzel font.
2. Update tailwind.config.js to include the custom colors (gold, iris) and font families.
4. Implement the 'SessionDetail' page with the specified layout.
5. Ensure the 'Booking' section has the 'gold_wave' animation as requested.
6. Use the provided image URLs for the session cards and hero background.
